tasks.instruction: Find articles about coping with cravings published within the last 12 months with a reading time between 5 and 15 minutes, and add the first three results to your reading list.

Urge Surfing: Riding Out Cravings Without Giving In

tasks.instruction: Register for a relapse prevention workshop happening on a Saturday next month that costs $10 or less, selecting an online attendance option and completing the registration form with the given name, email, city, and brief goal statement.

expected_values.registration_goal_message: I want to prevent relapse after 3 months sober
